description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that creates a source distribution and wheel for a Python package, and optionally publishes it to PyPI. The workflow can be triggered manually with optional inputs for a specific commit SHA and a dry run. It uses ubuntu-latest jobs to check out the code, set up Python 3.11, create and test the source distribution and wheel, and upload them as artifacts. A separate job with permissions to write ID tokens downloads the artifacts and publishes them to PyPI if the dry run input is false.
